emails.body: #510352 This deal is entered as not to be confirmed. It looks like it probably should be confirmed. Can you check into this and see what happened? Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: #510352
emails.body: Re: #510352 I've changed it to be confirmed. Chris Mallory usually does mostly daily deals, so his deal blotter probably defaults to no confirm. Thanks, kate From: Sharen Cason 02/01/2001 07:00 AM
